description: Synthetic, hand-labeled clinical scenarios for evaluating the fallback triage engine. Labels encode the safety rules for symptom severity (presence of red-flag acute keywords) and duration (>14 days for chronic risk). Perfect agreement is expected; this dataset serves to prevent regression in critical fallback logic.

cases.symptoms: Patient reports sudden onset of crushing chest pain radiating to left arm.
cases.label: HIGH
cases.rationale: Red-flag acute keyword 'chest pain' present; requires emergency care.

cases.symptoms: Experiencing breathing difficulty and wheezing since yesterday morning.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Sudden weakness on left side of face and arm, slurred speech.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Patient had a brief loss of consciousness at home after standing up.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Chronic cough, night sweats, and weight loss for three weeks.
cases.label: HIGH
cases.rationale: Duration of 21 days exceeds the 14-day chronic triage threshold.

cases.symptoms: Persistent migraine and joint pain lasting for over two weeks.
cases.label: HIGH
cases.rationale: Duration of 15 days exceeds the 14-day chronic threshold.

cases.symptoms: Mild allergic rhinitis with sneezing and runny nose.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH
cases.rationale: Low duration (3 days) and no critical symptom keywords present.

cases.symptoms: Slightly sore throat and scratchy voice.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Moderate tension headache and neck stiffness after screen work.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Minor burn on index finger from cooking; skin is intact.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Mild fever, fatigue, and muscle aches for six days.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH
cases.rationale: Medium risk (6 days is sub-acute), classified as NOT_HIGH (non-emergency).

cases.symptoms: Persistent stomach ache and nausea for eight days.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Dry throat, occasional dry cough for four days.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Mild ankle sprain after running; minor swelling, can walk.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Acute severe bleeding from deep laceration on forearm.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Patient experienced a grand mal seizure at work today.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Suspected poisoning after accidentally swallowing household cleaner.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Severe depression with active suicidal ideation reported.
cases.label: HIGH

cases.symptoms: Itchy eyes and runny nose since spring started.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH

cases.symptoms: Mild eczema patch on elbow, slightly itchy.
cases.label: NOT_HIGH
cases.rationale: Chronic/sub-acute skin issue under 14 days, non-emergency.
